mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_personal_tag (user_id, name, color, sort_order) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{color}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_personal_tag WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_personal_tag WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_personal_tag WHERE user_id = #{userId}
